description: Contact Event Pipeline — Worker Handlers + Event Types. (1) Zero contact event handlers in events worker (W-02). (2) Only 2/8 contact event types in DOMAIN_EVENT_TYPES — missing deleted, account_associated, account_disassociated, converted_from_lead, linked_to_lead, interacted (W-04). (3) No webhook routing for contact events (W-05). (4) No notifications for contact events (W-11). Cross-ref: W-01 (InMemoryEventBus) shared with IFC-250. Audit: docs/audit/contact-detail-wiring-audit.md §17.
notes: Contact audit finding: W-02,W-04,W-05,W-11. See docs/audit/contact-detail-wiring-audit.md
